name: Company and Business Entity Incorporation
appliesTo: Formal business organisations seeking registration in Zimbabwe
notes: Entity forms and filing requirements differ; confirm the current route and document list with DCIP before filing.

name: ZIMRA Taxpayer Registration
appliesTo: Individuals, companies, partnerships and cooperatives starting a business
notes: Successful registration results in a Taxpayer Identification Number. Tax types and attachments depend on the taxpayer's circumstances.

name: ZIMRA Value Added Tax Registration
appliesTo: Persons trading in taxable supplies who meet the current compulsory VAT registration rules
notes: The turnover threshold is intentionally omitted because it can change; confirm the current compulsory or voluntary registration rules with ZIMRA.

name: ZIMRA PAYE Employer Registration
appliesTo: Businesses that become employers
notes: Registration is distinct from the ongoing deduction, remittance and annual employee-return obligations.

name: NSSA Employer Registration
appliesTo: Employers of labour and their employees
statutoryBasis: National Social Security Authority Act [Chapter 17:04] and applicable schemes
notes: Scheme coverage, employee registration and contribution treatment must be confirmed with NSSA for the employer's workforce.

name: PRAZ Bidder and Contractor Registration
appliesTo: Suppliers, bidders and contractors seeking eligibility for public procurement
requiredDocuments: Memorandum and articles of association or other constitutive document
statutoryBasis: Public Procurement and Disposal of Public Assets Act and Public Procurement and Disposal of Public Assets (General) Regulations, 2018
notes: Registration is category-specific. Fees are deliberately omitted and must be checked on the current eGP portal.

name: Harare Business Licence
appliesTo: Retail and wholesale shops
Food premises
Businesses listed for a Harare municipal licence
statutoryBasis: Shop Licence Act [Chapter 14:17] and Harare (Licensed Premises) By-laws
notes: Licence class and municipal-health requirements vary by activity; consult the current council checklist and notices.

name: Harare Health Registration of Business Premises
appliesTo: Business premises listed on Harare's Health Registration application form
statutoryBasis: Urban Councils Act [Chapter 29:15] and Harare Health Registration of Premises By-laws
notes: The official form supports new, renewal and change-of-ownership applications but does not establish a renewal cadence; confirm it with City Health.

name: Bulawayo Shop Licence
appliesTo: Retail and wholesale activity conducted from a shop, store or other fixed business premises
requiredDocuments: Approved trading-permit application for a new applicant
Valid trading permit and enabling certificate for a full shop licence
Original prior-year shop licence for a renewal
notes: A temporary trading permit and a full shop licence are distinct stages; confirm which approval is required before trading.

name: Bulawayo Registration Certificate for Business Premises
appliesTo: Food premises
Hairdressers
Hotels, boarding houses and lodging houses
Laundries and dry cleaners
Other premises listed by the Bulawayo Health Inspectorate
requiredDocuments: Town-planning approval where the proposed activity requires it
statutoryBasis: Public Health Act [Chapter 15:09], Food and Food Standards Act [Chapter 15:04], and applicable Bulawayo public-health and registration-of-premises by-laws
notes: Applicability and premises standards vary by activity; the council directs applicants to Environmental Health for premises-specific advice.

name: Zimbabwe Liquor Licence
appliesTo: Businesses applying for a liquor licence in Zimbabwe
notes: This is a national overview. Confirm the correct licence class, supporting documents, expiry and renewal rule with the Liquor Licensing Board.

name: Environmental and Social Impact Assessment Certificate
appliesTo: Projects in EMA-listed sectors that may have negative environmental effects
requiredDocuments: Prospectus covering the project, location, baseline environment, anticipated impacts, mitigation measures, project cost, terms of reference and legal framework
statutoryBasis: Environmental Management Act and applicable statutory instruments
typicalProcessingTime: EMA states 60 working days for ESIA review and at least one month for renewal processing.
notes: Applicability is project-specific. The certificate is multi-year, with renewal conditions published by EMA rather than an annual cadence.

name: Effluent Licence
appliesTo: Enterprises discharging effluent
Industrial and mining operations discharging effluent
requiredDocuments: Identification document for the company manager or director
Local-council endorsement when disposing into a council reticulation system
statutoryBasis: Environmental Management Act and applicable statutory instruments
notes: EMA publishes different requirements for enterprise and industrial or mining effluent licensing, including inspections and, for industrial or mining operations, laboratory tests.

name: Electricity Generation Licence
appliesTo: Electricity-generation activities requiring a ZERA licence
notes: Confirm the applicable electricity licence class, term and current application requirements with ZERA.

name: Petroleum Retail Licence
appliesTo: Petroleum retail activities requiring a ZERA licence
notes: Confirm the applicable petroleum activity, licence term and current requirements with ZERA.

name: Liquefied Petroleum Gas Retail Licence
appliesTo: Liquefied-petroleum-gas retail activities requiring a ZERA licence
notes: Confirm the applicable LPG activity, licence term and current requirements with ZERA.

name: Unified Telecommunications Services Licence
appliesTo: Telecommunications services within the published POTRAZ unified licence category
notes: POTRAZ publishes multiple communications licence categories; confirm the correct category, term and current application route before applying.

name: Medicines Premises Licence
appliesTo: Medicines premises and business types subject to MCAZ licensing
notes: MCAZ licensing distinguishes premises and business types; use the current official form and guidance.
